image_headline: NO PAST PERFORMANCE? HERE'S YOUR ENTRY POINT.
image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'THE MYTH' in red with X icon, three 2-word labels: 'Need Track Record', 'No Way In', 'Years Required'. Right panel white/light, bold label 'THE REALITY' in green with checkmark icon, three 2-word labels: 'Subs Count', 'Simplified Acquisitions', 'Team Up'. Center: illustrated professional woman in suit walking confidently from dark left panel to bright right panel through an open door. Bold headline top: 'NO PAST PERFORMANCE? HERE'S YOUR ENTRY POINT.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
